prompt: Define features for Mainova AG's digital energy services. Mainova is a Frankfurt-based Stadtwerk and energy supplier (~3000 employees, 1M customers). They operate energy trading, grid operations (Strom, Gas, Fernwaerme), smart metering, and digital customer services. Focus on their core IT/digital service capabilities as a portfolio. Use the b2b-ict taxonomy.

assertions.text: All required fields present (slug, product_slug, name, description)
taxonomy_mapping present with dimension, category_id, category_name
readiness is one of ga, beta, planned
Feature quality assessor returns no fail ratings
